rag_validation.methodology: in the opposite direction, breaking a previous high or low, then a diver¬ gence or failure swing is confirmed. The 50 level is the RSI midpoint value, and will often act as support during pullbacks and resistance during bounces. Some traders treat RSI crossings above and below the 50 level as buying and selling signals respectively. USING THE 70 AND 30 LINES TO GENERATE SIGNALS Horizontal lines ap
supporting_passages: The stock rallied to a new high, while RSI couldn’t reach its upper reference line, pointing to that rally’s hidden weakness. The sharp break near the right edge pushes prices lower despite the RSI buy signal. profits. Choosing the width of the Stochastic window is important. Shorter-term oscillators are more sensitive. Longer-term oscillators turn only at important tops and bottoms. If you use Stochastic as a stand-alone oscillator, a longer Stochastic is preferable. If you use Stochastic as part of a trading system, combined with trend- following indicators, then a shorter Stochastic is preferable. ■

final_decision:
EXECUTE: FALSE
REASON: Despite technical indicators (oversold RSI 28.5, positive MACD, volume spike) and passed risk rules, the bearish chart pattern narrative on Solana combined with neutral smart money positioning and a broader market weakness signal (HYPE -22%) present insufficient edge to justify entry, particularly with the tight stop at $68.54 leaving minimal buffer against a confirmed bearish pattern breakdown.
